mnemonics: S.A.F.E. Leaders: Strategy, Accountability, Framework, Engagement - the four pillars of a Safety Culture.
keyPoints: Leadership commitment is the cornerstone of a strong safety culture; it must be visibly demonstrated and championed from the top down.
Safety must be proactively integrated into business processes, risk management, and performance metrics, not treated as a separate compliance exercise.
A just culture that encourages transparent reporting of errors and near-misses without fear of blame is essential for identifying and mitigating risks in AI systems.
commonMistakes: Treating AI safety as solely a technical problem solved by engineers, rather than an organizational and cultural challenge requiring company-wide engagement.
Focusing only on reactive measures after an incident occurs, instead of building proactive, preventative strategies into the business management lifecycle.
